entries.title: CrowdStrike Launches Continuous Identity Solution to Police AI Agents
entries.summary: CrowdStrike has added a new security control plane for artificial intelligence agents that provides continuous, risk-aware enforcement. entries.title: Microsoft Faces Shareholder Lawsuit Over Alleged AI Spending Cover-Up
entries.summary: Microsoft shareholders sued the company Friday (June 12), alleging that it defrauded them and inflated its stock price by concealing slower growth in its Azure cloud business and a need to invest billions of dollars in artificial intelligence infrastructure, Reuters reported Monday (June 15). entries.title: Arcade Raises $60 Million to Control AI Agents
entries.summary: Arcade.dev raised $60 million in a Series A funding round to grow its secure action layer for production artificial intelligence agents, designed to prove which agent took which action, on behalf of which user. entries.title: AI Scam Surge Prompts Google to File Lawsuit
entries.summary: Phishing texts that mimic a bank alert or a package delivery notice usually point to a fake website built to capture passwords and card numbers. Google says one criminal network used artificial intelligence to build those websites at a scale no human team could match. entries.title: AIQ Markets teams with MarketAxess on AI-native corporate bond tech
entries.summary: AIQ Markets, a New York-based fintech company building AI-powered tools for the U.S. corporate bond market, has partnered with MarketAxess, a leading electronic trading platform for fixed-income securities, to develop AIQ Insight™, an AI-native tool designed for fixed-income traders and portfolio managers.
